meta.note: Key is source zh text; value is translated target text.

en.仅在“面板尺寸”选择“自定义尺寸”时生效。: Only applies when Panel Size is set to Custom.
en.选择图片目录。\n\n单卷：目录下直接是 jpg / jpeg / png 图片:
Select image folder.

Single: root contains jpg/jpeg/png images directly.
Batch: root contains multiple subfolders, each with images.
Mixed layout is invalid.
en.单卷输出 .kpf 文件；批量输出到一个目录。: Single mode outputs a .kpf file; batch mode outputs to a directory.
en.常用放主要参数，高级放画质和兼容性微调。: Common: key options. Advanced: quality and compatibility tuning.
en.选择目标设备/面板尺寸。选择“自定义尺寸”后会弹出尺寸设置窗口。: Choose target device/panel size. 'Custom size' opens a size dialog.
en.选择生成格式。当前可用：KPF、KPF + KFX、仅 KFX。EPUB / M: Choose output format. Available now: KPF, KPF + KFX, KFX only. EPUB/MOBI are placeholders and not implemented yet.
en.把当前参数保存成一个新方案。: Save current settings as a new profile.
en.对当前选中的参数方案执行加载、覆盖、删除、默认等操作。: Perform load/overwrite/delete/default actions for selected profile.
en.恢复为当前 image preset 的默认 gamma。: Reset to default gamma for current image preset.
en.恢复为当前 image preset 的默认 JPEG 质量。: Reset to default JPEG quality for current image preset.
en.预览固定取第 10 页；Facing 时会自动带上配对页。: Preview always uses page 10; Facing mode automatically includes paired page.
en.开启后显示原图，并用红色框标出当前裁边保留范围。关闭后显示裁边后的输出效果。: On: show source image with red crop box. Off: show processed output.
en.弹出更大的独立窗口，以完整比例查看当前预览。: Open a larger window to view current preview at full ratio.
en.收起或展开实时预览区域，给右侧其他信息留出空间。: Collapse or expand live preview area to free space.
en.等待输入目录后生成预览。: Preview appears after input folder is detected.
en.预览会反映当前裁边、色彩、单页/双页、RTL/LTR 与首页偏移。: Preview reflects crop, color, single/facing, RTL/LTR and first-page shift.
en.单卷：选择放图片的目录；批量：选择包含多个分卷子目录的上层目录。: Single: choose folder containing images. Batch: choose parent folder containing volume subfolders.
en.点击“开始生成”后显示实时日志。: Live logs appear after clicking Start.
en.当前参数方案不存在，请重新选择。: Selected profile does not exist. Please choose again.
en.单卷模式：预览当前目录的第 10 页。: Single mode: preview page 10 in current folder.
en.批量目录下还没有可预览的分卷。: No previewable volume found in batch folder.
en.Single 单页布局不需要首页偏移，因此这里会自动关闭。: Single layout does not use first-page shift; it is auto-disabled.
en.只有开启 Virtual Panels 后，Panel 格式才会参与生成。: Panel movement applies only when Virtual Panels are enabled.
en.批量模式下每本书都会直接使用各自子目录名作为标题，不会自动追加统一后缀。: In batch mode, each book uses its subfolder name directly; no common suffix is appended.
en.检测为单卷时填写单本输出文件；检测为批量时填写输出目录。: In single mode use an output file; in batch mode use an output directory.
en.输出位置会自动推荐为同名文件；版式与阅读方式由上面的常用选项决定。: Output path is auto-suggested; layout/reading options come from common settings.
en.整理目录结构后再运行。: Fix folder structure, then run again.
en.根目录图片和含图片子目录同时存在，无法判断单卷或批量。: Root images and image subfolders coexist; cannot decide single or batch mode.
en.换一个包含 jpg / jpeg / png 的目录。: Choose a folder containing jpg / jpeg / png images.
en.后台任务即将启动。: Background task is about to start.
en.状态：已按请求停止后续任务。: Status: Stopped remaining tasks by request.
en.当前没有找到可打开的输出位置。: No output location can be opened right now.
en.请先等待当前任务结束，再切换界面语言。: Please wait for current task to finish before switching language.
en.模板文件：使用内置 RTL 双页漫画静态资产。: Template: using built-in RTL facing static assets.
en.已收到停止请求，当前卷处理完成后不再继续后续卷。: Stop requested: no more queued volumes after current one.
en.停止请求已生效：未继续排队新的分卷任务。: Stop request applied: no new volume tasks were queued.

en.pattern: ^根目录图片：(\d+) 张；冲突子目录：(.+)$
^其余成功条目：… 共 (\d+) 卷$
^单卷任务：(\d+) 张图片 → 1 个输出文件 · (.+)$
^批量任务：(\d+) 个分卷 → 多个输出文件 · (.+)$
en.template: Batch task: {0} volumes → multiple output files · {1}

en.pattern: ^批量模式：预览第一卷 `(.+)` 的第 10 页。$
en.template: Batch mode: preview page 10 of first volume `{0}`.

en.pattern: ^参数方案“(.+)”已存在，要覆盖它吗？$
^删除“(.+)”吗？此操作不会影响已生成文件。$
en.template: Delete profile '{0}'? Generated files are not affected.

en.pattern: ^留空时自动输出到 (.+) 子目录$
^单卷输出文件。留空时默认输出到输入目录下的同名子目录，例如：输入目录/目录名_(.+)/目录名(.+)$
en.template: Single output file. Blank defaults to input_dir/folder_{0}/folder{1}

en.pattern: ^批量输出目录。留空时默认输出到输入目录下的同名子目录，例如：输入目录/目录名_(.+)$
en.template: Batch output directory. Blank defaults to input_dir/folder_{0}

en.pattern: ^检测为单卷模式：根目录直接包含 (\d+)张图片。$
en.template: Single mode detected: root contains {0} images.

en.pattern: ^检测为批量模式：根目录没有直接图片，以下子目录可作为分卷处理：(.+)。$
en.template: Batch mode detected: root has no direct images; these subfolders are volumes: {0}.

en.pattern: ^无法自动识别输入模式：根目录下直接有图片，同时这些子目录也包含图片：(.+)。请整理为纯单卷目录或纯批量目录后再运行。$
en.template: Cannot infer mode automatically: root has images and these subfolders also have images: {0}. Please keep a pure single or pure batch structure.

en.pattern: ^未找到可处理内容：根目录没有图片，子目录里也没有包含图片的有效卷。$
en.template: No processable content found: no images in root and no valid image volumes in subfolders.
Input path is not a directory: {0}

en.pattern: ^批量并发处理中（(\d+) 个工作线程）$
